blended.narrative: Hunter Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,915 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.5" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
